stemHtml: The main inputs to the autopilot/autoflight are…

options.a: Air Data Computer (ADC), Inertial Referencing System (IRS) and Mode Control Panel (MCP).
options.b: Inertial Referencing System (IRS), Mode Control Panel (MCP) and GPWS.
options.c: Inertial Referencing System (IRS), Mode Control Panel (MCP) and TCAS.
options.d: Air Data Computer (ADC), GPWS and TCAS.
